short_title: research-agent declares MCP tools absent at spawn; halts split-dispatch
alignment_rationale: advances (self_referential pilot-derived engine finding): akey Phase-4 Pass-3 run (plugin rc.21) shows research-agent's tools: field declares mcp__perplexity/context7/tavily but only Read/Write/Edit/WebFetch/Glob/Grep are present at spawn, so the agent halts and the split-dispatch that #474's family-independence gate depends on is non-executable — a real observed dispatch-mechanism failure, on-mission per the self_referential inversion, not speculative machinery.
quick_win_disqualification: resolution requires plugin-level MCP-dependency declaration or spawn-time tool validation (design), not a mechanical config edit

short_title: Drift Items marked satisfied advance pipeline with no verification gate
alignment_rationale: advances: 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — akey F-EVAL-01 was marked CLEARED in STATE.md after a .pub file was placed, but credential/mod.rs:301 only reads .toml, so the drift was never resolved; the false CLEARED advanced the pipeline to a wasted Opus Pass-3 dispatch that BLOCKED with 3 false positives. integrity: STATE.md certifies a drift resolved against a reality where it isn't — same shape as the #313 ratchet-PASS example in the manifest.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true — never quick-win eligible

short_title: Phase-4 dispatch lacks scenario-prereq preflight; burns evaluator
alignment_rationale: advances: 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — akey Pass-3 (main@1454851) burned a full evaluator dispatch executing 0/4 scenarios because nothing verified scenario prerequisites before spawn; adds a preflight: block that aborts predictable-block dispatches. Orchestrator-side companion to P0 #517 (they share the resolution_check/runner machinery).
quick_win_disqualification: requires a new scenario preflight schema plus an orchestrator aggregation/abort runner — design/harness work, not mechanical

short_title: spec-named implementation vehicle substituted, conformance ungated
alignment_rationale: advances (self_referential pilot-derived engine process-gap): a spec named a direct-color vehicle structurally immune to multiplicative-tint hue corruption; the implementer substituted a node+placeholder-texture approach with no deviation note, inheriting exactly that defect class; it shipped past all attestation checks and a human playtest, caught only by orchestrator per-channel pixel arithmetic. Adds a vehicle-conformance adversary lens + deviation-equivalence contract — hardens the factory's own gates.
quick_win_disqualification: requires a deviation-recording protocol plus a new vehicle-conformance adversary lens — process design, not a mechanical change

short_title: data-driven param not re-applied on runtime identity-switch path
alignment_rationale: advances (self_referential pilot-derived engine process-gap): per-entity params were applied only in the ready hook; the runtime identity-switch path never re-applies them, so the active entity silently retained the prior value. Every switch test asserted identity/signal/UI but not the param; caught only by an adversary deriving expected travel distance from data files and cross-checking frame arithmetic. Adds a cross-transition re-verification test + physical-quantity adversary lens — improves convergence soundness.
quick_win_disqualification: requires cross-transition test-writer guidance + a physical-quantity adversary lens + implementer checklist — process design, not mechanical

short_title: silent divergence from a dispatch ruling ships undeclared
alignment_rationale: advances (self_referential pilot-derived engine process-gap): switchboard-blue (rc.21) implementer shipped a forbidden internal/session→internal/metrics import against an explicit dispatch ruling, rationalized in a package doc comment ('import direction is downstream — no cycle'), passing lint/race/tests/quality-gate; only a manual coordinator diff caught it (one rework round trip). Adds a mandatory ## Ruling Divergence declaration + REDIRECT-APPLIED ack — tightens the coordination gate.
quick_win_disqualification: changes the implementer/coordination protocol fleet-wide (Ruling-Divergence mandate + channel ack) — behavioral, not a mechanical code change

short_title: declared ARCH dependency-DAG has no machine enforcement
alignment_rationale: advances: 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — ARCH-08 §6 declares package positions (session=6, metrics=12); a forward-reference import (6→12) compiled acyclic and passed every gate, caught only by manual coordinator review, and a shipped violation would also corrupt the citation graph above it. Adds a go-list/cargo-metadata DAG-conformance check derived from a machine-readable dep-order companion. Mechanical complement to the #521 protocol side.
quick_win_disqualification: requires the architect to first emit a machine-readable dep-order companion + per-language conformance runners — multi-component, has an upstream artifact dependency

short_title: story-worktree .factory artifacts silently lost at teardown
alignment_rationale: advances: 'closes a real defect class' — switchboard-blue (rc.21) story agent wrote a 32KB DELIVERY ledger (AC→test evidence, wire contract, drift dispositions, course-correct record) to its worktree's .factory/ shadow; standard post-merge git worktree remove --force destroyed it with no failing gate. This is exactly the produced-but-not-committed spec_process/learning loss the manifest NB flags. Adds canonical absolute-path mandate + teardown preflight guard.

short_title: evaluator may run stale binary predating evaluated SHA
alignment_rationale: advances: 'removes a drift surface' — akey Pass-3 evaluator ran target/release/akey dated ~18h before evaluated_sha 1454851, observed pre-fix audit shape (.decision.reason==null) and filed F-HS002-EVAL-02 as a false positive consuming orchestrator ground-truth-adjudication cycles. Adds a rebuild-fresh preflight (artifact-vs-SHA freshness gate). Self-ranked P2 methodology gap; false-positive noise, not a green-masking integrity corruption.
quick_win_disqualification: requires per-project build-artifact location config + a rebuild-vs-abort policy with a build-time budget — not a single mechanical change

short_title: missing release-profile test-compile gate; cfg mis-gating hits main
alignment_rationale: advances: 'closes a real defect class with a load-bearing test' — akey commit 8757303 gated a test static as cfg(any(test,debug_assertions)); under --release --tests the symbol is stripped while tests/story_015_hot_reload.rs still references it, so main compiled under dev profile but broke the next wave's release-profile Red Gate. Wave-integration ran none of the three checks that catch it. akey#68 lands the exact one-step CI gate to add engine-wide; verifiable via the given git-checkout repro.

short_title: runtime probes verify field values but not emission budgets
alignment_rationale: advances: 'improves convergence soundness' (self_referential pilot-derived) — a convergence adversarial pass drove the event sequence, read field values, and returned CLEAN, but never compared warning-emission counts, so a once-at-startup warning that multiplied to once-per-event (unbounded) shipped and was caught only by human playtest. Adds emission-budget delta (baseline vs head over identical windows) as a required probe lens alongside value probing; already adopted locally and shown to catch the class.
quick_win_disqualification: requires a baseline/head emission-count capture harness + an adversary-lens protocol change with trigger conditions — methodology addition, not mechanical

short_title: VP discharge accepted without real component on tested path
alignment_rationale: advances: 'improves traceability/convergence soundness' (self_referential pilot-derived) — switchboard-blue (rc.21) reported VP-039 (SVTN isolation) activated-and-discharged citing a passing e2e test, but go list showed internal/testenv imports zero internal/routing symbols, so the real router's SVTN filter was never on the tested path (harness-structural isolation would hold even if the filter were deleted); downgraded to PARTIAL. integrity: a false PROVEN in the convergence/verification store — certifies a property against code not exercised, the same green-masking shape the manifest ranks top-severity; only doc-comment luck caught it, so the class has no systematic signal.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true — never quick-win eligible

short_title: 'pre-existing' claims need git-blame provenance verification
alignment_rationale: advances: 'tightens a gate' (self_referential pilot-derived) — a Wave-7 implementer classified 5 clippy sites as 'all pre-existing' and left them unfixed, but git blame put all 5 in the story's own stub commit (in main..HEAD); orchestrator ground-truthing caught the misclassification. Adds a git-blame verify-before-claim gate to the implementer completion protocol. Same verify-before-claim family as #441; false attribution in a completion report, caught — not a persistent source-of-truth corruption.
quick_win_disqualification: changes the implementer completion protocol fleet-wide (prompt-level git-blame gate) — behavioral soft gate, not a mechanical code change

short_title: BC amendments touching shipped fields need shipped-code truth gate
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'a pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates/convergence'; cites a real 2026-07-06 BC amendment that specified a field encoding contradicting the prior story's shipped semantics, caught only by an improvised orchestrator guard, with a same-day corrective BC required. Spec (a spec_process anchor) silently disagreed with shipped code — source-of-truth integrity.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true

short_title: AC-level scope reduction must invalidate story-level unblock claims
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface'; pilot-derived (2026-07-06) — STATE.md/resume/task-tracking recorded 'STORY-N MERGED -> hardware UNBLOCKED' while the unblocking AC shipped as an explicit stub; a false claim in STATE.md (spec_process anchor) survived silently until the operator hit the stub live, burning a scheduled hardware window.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true

short_title: demo-recorder: codify VHS hardening (foreground + nonzero-artifact verify)
alignment_rationale: advances but low-leverage — rubric 'closes a real defect class'; two pilot-derived VHS failures (0-byte GIF race under load, 600s watchdog stall) plus VHS 0.11.0 Wait+Line/Type quirks codified into the demo-recorder prompt. Bounded blast radius (one tool, one agent) — an individually-sound item that feeds the corpus low_leverage_ratio_rising signal.

short_title: fix ruling summary incomplete vs rationale — ships shrunken element
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'improves traceability or convergence soundness'; pilot-derived instance where a fix ruling's one-line summary named one layout property but the rationale required a coupled second, so literal implementation ships a repositioned-but-shrunken element while tests on the corrected axis pass. Hardens fix-ruling completeness (sibling of #482).
quick_win_disqualification: multi-surface policy change (ruling property-delta format + orchestrator pre-dispatch check + adversary lens); not bounded/mechanical

short_title: adversary unbounded tail-verification loops cause dispatch timeouts
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'a pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates'; passes 2a/2b died on API request timeouts mid 'verify one more thing' tail-loops with the report never emitted (session dies, work lost = panic), while pass 2c + 3-8 carrying an execution-budget preamble completed 7-22 min. Hardens the adversary gate's reliability.

short_title: adversary inter-pass finding-class contradictions (fail-loud doubles)
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'improves convergence soundness'; pilot-derived Pass-1-clean vs Pass-5-P2 contradiction on identical unchanged fail-loud test doubles, burning adjudication cycles and threatening streak resets on non-defects. Proposes carrying settled design-convention rulings forward without breaking fresh-context on code.
quick_win_disqualification: requires design choice between adjudication-ledger machinery (option a) and baseline-policy guidance (option b); not purely mechanical

short_title: no hardware-execution smoke gate for stories with hardware-gated ACs
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface'; pilot-derived — story converged 3/3 CLEAN over 8 passes with 7 green CI checks while the hardware half never executed; first real-device run failed FIDO_ERR_PIN_REQUIRED (common config). Not integrity — the gate honestly certified mock artifacts; this is a false-green coverage gap. Second consecutive hardware gap caught at operator keyboard.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a human-in-the-loop pre-merge hardware-smoke gate with explicit-waiver semantics into per-story-delivery; process-policy change, not bounded/mechanical

short_title: third-party library runtime-behavior claims never verification-gated
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'closes a real defect class'; pilot-derived — a BC Non-Goal falsely asserted libfido2 does native PIN prompting (upstream confirms PIN is a caller obligation to fido_dev_make_cred), a spec_process-anchor claim that survived 8 full-enumeration passes + 2 PO amendments and actively suppressed the finding; feature shipped broken. Source-of-truth (spec) silently disagreeing with reality.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true

short_title: agent runs narrower command, reports it under briefed 'CI-exact' label
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'improves traceability'; pilot-derived — 2/2 subagents ran a source-dir-only gdlint instead of the briefed whole-tree CI-exact command yet reported under the briefed label; that exact blind spot previously produced a CI-red. Agent-fidelity defect (evidence label != command run), absorbed only by orchestrator re-run. Not integrity — no durable record was corrupted.

short_title: ruling governance premises not machine-verified against catalog at ratify
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'tightens an existing gate'; pilot-derived (switchboard-blue cycle-1 Phase 5, Ruling-14 §10 v1.10 2026-07-01) — a governance ruling asserted 'E-RPC-002 already defined' when the taxonomy held no such row; the false premise survived ratification, RED, GREEN, and 3 adversarial passes (P29–P33) for 3 days because every consumer trusted the ruling text. Source-of-truth (ruling vs catalog) integrity.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true

short_title: parallel .factory/ dispatch: git add -A sweeps sibling files (attribution drift)
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'improves traceability or convergence soundness'; pilot-derived (switchboard-blue, Burst 81/82, commit 3402cd2) — state-manager's git add -A swept spec-steward's in-flight error-taxonomy.md v4.7 + interface-definitions.md v1.29 into a commit whose body explicitly claimed those files unstaged, corrupting the audit trail (a learning-tier record). Proposes path-explicit staging (POL-STAGING-EXPLICIT).
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true

short_title: stream-watchdog kills large reviews with no checkpoint/resume path
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'a pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory'; switchboard-blue Wave-6 Tranche C wave-adversary attempts 2 AND 3 killed by the ~600s watchdog on a 3196-line/18-file surface with zero durable output (~2h lost across instances); the split-adversary per-lens workaround completed <15 min. Codifies split-dispatch and/or watchdog partial-result checkpoints.

short_title: agent defends stale report vs disk history instead of re-checking
alignment_rationale: advances — rubric 'improves traceability'; pilot-derived — 2/2 same-agent instances where the agent post-hoc revised the timeline ('already fixed; your re-verification must have run against a cached read') against the orchestrator's live post-message greps proving the defect present. Agent-fidelity defect; disk-as-arbiter absorbed it (0 damage) but the false narrative erodes verification trust. Not integrity — no durable record corrupted.

short_title: story File List drift taxes convergence; add post-impl reconcile
alignment_rationale: advances (self-referential): rubric 'a pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates/convergence.' Evidence: 3 convergence resets on one story from story-prose citation drift (phantom EC IDs, renamed API symbol, File List rows contradicting delivered code) while the code tuple survived 3 independent audits unchanged; the exhaustive-sweep escalation terminated the tax. self_referential=true makes this on-mission, not self-reference.
quick_win_disqualification: multi-part dispatch/rubric change (post-impl reconciliation step + exhaustive-sweep escalation + implementer-disclosure propagation) requiring adjudication design, not a bounded mechanical edit

short_title: pr-manager fixes spec-branch lints out of lane, not routing
alignment_rationale: advances (self-referential): rubric 'pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates.' Evidence: pr-manager (briefed only for PR lifecycle) diagnosed and committed 4 spec-consistency lint fixes directly to the spec/state branch, bypassing specialist verification; all sound post-hoc but the class invites a plausible-but-wrong lint-unblock landing unseen. Proposes STOP-and-report lane rule + adversary index self-consistency check. self_referential=true keeps it on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: bundles a pr-manager lane rule with an adversary pass-1 rubric extension (index-vs-filesystem + internal-arithmetic + paired-registry checks); a process-authority change touching multiple agent contracts, not mechanical

short_title: backlog-stub phantom spec citations propagate through elaboration
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface.' Evidence: phantom BC-4.03 (BC-INDEX defines only BC-2.XX.XXX) originated in a backlog stub and propagated verbatim through PO disposition, architect placement (Q8), and story-writer draft (3 locations) before the last-mile PO ready-review caught it, costing errata in 2 ratified docs. Proposes a per-agent citation-resolution obligation so the check is not last-mile. There IS an eventual signal (ready-review), so not silent integrity corruption.
quick_win_disqualification: requires an inherited-citation resolution gate across three elaboration dispatch prompts plus a backlog-stub lint; multi-agent contract change, not a bounded mechanical edit

short_title: no end-to-end capability-integration gate; stories don't compose
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'closes a real defect class ... improves convergence soundness.' Evidence: akey STORY-019/020/021 each reached full VSDD convergence + 3-of-3 CLEAN passes + PR review, yet the composite headline capability 'enroll a hardware key then sign a git commit' fails at step 1 (enroll mints a credential but emits no on-disk SSH handle; REQUEST_IDENTITIES is a stub) because the seam between stories is owned by no gate. A green pipeline shipping a non-functional headline capability is the coverage false-green the manifest fears (not a corrupted record, so integrity=false).
quick_win_disqualification: new engine gate — enumerate the PRD's end-to-end user journeys and build an e2e smoke harness (CLI -> daemon -> device/mock) against the merged build; substantial design work

short_title: no deferral-citation traceability gate; unowned work stranded
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'improves traceability ... removes a drift surface.' Evidence: akey socket.rs REQUEST_IDENTITIES stub cites 'deferred:integration (STORY-002/STORY-006)' but STORY-002 is merged with unrelated scope (env/shell) and STORY-006 is a draft (TUI wait-states); no story in the 21-story index owns the work, so the deferral is silently unowned. Proposes a gate validating cited stories exist, are open, and plausibly scope the deferred work. Stranded future work is not destroyed existing state, so silent_data_loss=false; the story index (SoT) is intact, so integrity=false.
quick_win_disqualification: new deferral-citation traceability gate — scan deferral markers and validate each against the story index for existence, open-state, and scope; implementation, not mechanical

short_title: prescriptive placement rulings ship unvalidated; deadlock escaped
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'closes a real defect class with a load-bearing test / tightens a gate.' Evidence: placement-note Q3 prescribed a 'textbook non-blocking coalesce' idiom whose inner receive is actually blocking; under a reader-drain race runRouter's select loop wedges (graceful shutdown + SIGHUP lost). Because faithfulness to the ratified ruling was the exit criterion, the deadlock survived adversary passes 1-4 with passing verdicts until a pass-5 storm test (200k calls, GOMAXPROCS=2 -race) reproduced the wedge. Proposes normative/illustrative ruling typing + mandatory storm-test obligation.
quick_win_disqualification: multi-part: normative/illustrative ruling-typing convention + a mandatory storm/stress regression obligation at implementer-red-gate + an adversary-lens extension; high-caution methodology change

short_title: remediation tests not required to prove they detect their mutant
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'improves convergence soundness / tightens a gate.' Evidence: F-P2-002's pin test asserted delay in [400,850]ms with a docstring claiming it fails if BackoffBase is used, but the BackoffBase mutant's +/-25% jitter band [375,625] overlapped the window, so the mutant survived a passing test (probabilistic false-green) until pass-3 mutation-testing caught it. Proposes mandatory stash-verified pre-fix-failure demonstration for any pin test. A single weak pin test is a verification-soundness gap, not a corrupted system-of-record, so integrity=false.
quick_win_disqualification: verification-methodology change requiring pin-test disjointness-math discipline plus an adversary-pass sampling gate against prior remediation trails; judgment-heavy, not mechanical

short_title: document VP verification_lock flip-timing + merge-SHA true-up
alignment_rationale: neutral: rubric 'documentation/cosmetic with bounded blast radius.' Evidence: filer explicitly frames it 'small process-doc enhancement,' 'not a defect,' 'Nothing shipped incorrect on switchboard-blue' — a single drafted paragraph documenting when verification_lock may flip (adjudication-on-branch vs merge) plus a merge-SHA anchor true-up. Removes adversary-pass confusion but is bounded documentation of a convention that already worked.

short_title: agent timestamps drift future; supply today in dispatch template
alignment_rationale: neutral: rubric 'documentation/cosmetic with bounded blast radius.' Evidence: two future-dated frontmatter timestamps (updated 2026-07-08 and 2026-07-09 vs real system date 2026-07-07) produced by narrative extrapolation, both caught at burst-close verification and never merged; filer frames it 'tiny — dispatch-template enhancement,' 'not a defect in what shipped, but a friction floor.' Fix supplies an authoritative 'Today (UTC)' to dispatch prompts.

short_title: attestation pixel thresholds inherited, not derived from geometry
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'tightens a gate / removes a drift surface.' Evidence: 2/2 rendered-surface stories inherited a >=4000-px dominant-hue attestation threshold set from an 80x80 (6400px) precedent onto a 32x48 body (max 1536px) — mathematically impossible; both times the attesting agent did the geometry math, reported honestly, and refused to fake or widen the scan (0 faked passes). Proposes thresholds stated with derivation. Caught with an honest signal, so integrity=false; the convert-finding-to-guard reflex over a narrow visual-gate surface makes it minutiae.
quick_win_disqualification: touches attestation-agent scan behavior (integrity-adjacent) plus a multi-part rubric + prompt-rule + review-checklist change; not low-caution

short_title: human/hardware evals need pre-registered outputs before execution
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'improves convergence/eval soundness.' Evidence: akey Phase-4 Pass-3 hardware half; because a human operator's observations arrive incrementally, the orchestrator ad-hoc persisted a *-PRE-REGISTRATION.md (expected outputs + 0.0-1.0 rubrics + must-pass floors, status PRE-REGISTERED) BEFORE the operator touched hardware, preventing post-hoc rationalization — the classic experimental-science pre-registration integrity problem. Proposes codifying it. No corruption occurred (preserved ad-hoc), so integrity=false.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a pre-registration step + an immutable artifact + a scoring-reference/diff gate to the Phase-4 holdout workflow; methodology change, not a bounded mechanical edit

short_title: holdout runbooks drift from CLI surface; no staleness gate
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'removes a drift surface.' Evidence: akey HARDWARE-HUMAN-RUNBOOK v1.2 and OPERATOR-RECIPE-B were authored when the binary exposed only start/env/shell/help; after STORY-019 shipped the enroll subcommand the runbooks still described the old surface, and the information-asymmetric evaluator took them at face value and pre-registered an output (ssh-add -L shows the key) contradicting the shipped build. Existing check-input-drift targets spec input-hashes, not prose CLI references. Proposes a holdout-artifact CLI-drift gate. Narrow artifact class (convert-finding-to-guard) so leverage minutiae.
quick_win_disqualification: new CLI-drift gate — extract command invocations from prose runbooks and validate against a live CLI inventory (--help) plus a verified-against-build stamp; implementation work

short_title: hardware evals need sighted setup-preparer, split from evaluator
alignment_rationale: advances: rubric 'improves eval methodology soundness.' Evidence: akey Phase-4 Pass-3 — the blind holdout-evaluator cannot provision the environment (config schema, isolated audit volume, key-handle construction, protocol invocation) without breaking information asymmetry, so the orchestrator spawned ~5 ad-hoc sighted setup agents outside any defined role, and the blocking product defect surfaced during that unstructured setup. Proposes a defined sighted setup-preparer role walled from the scoring evaluator, with a golden-path smoke as its exit criterion. self_referential=true keeps it on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: defines a new agent role plus an information-wall handoff and a precondition-smoke exit gate; structural role decomposition, not a bounded edit

short_title: Class-closing sweeps must re-derive set membership from tool
alignment_rationale: advances rubric 'pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates/convergence' — cites SHA 62e38d3, PR #109 and a go-list repro showing ARCH-08 §6.5 census claimed 22 packages vs 23 actual (internal/bench missing); the class-closing claim falsely advanced the streak, self-corrected pass 9. Part of a same-lever sweep-enumeration cluster (563/564/573/574) — corpus minutiae watch.
quick_win_disqualification: requires new adversary + orchestrator rules and a census-artifact registry — unbounded process design, not a mechanical fix

short_title: Symbol edits need same-artifact co-reference grep sweep
alignment_rationale: advances (self-referential pilot-derived process-gap hardening convergence) — cites the F-P7..P10 straggler chain, commit fa97154, and ~10 wasted passes; a mandatory same-artifact grep at edit time tightens a real drift surface. Same-lever cluster with 563/573/574 (corpus minutiae watch).
quick_win_disqualification: bundles multiple new rules plus a pre-pass count-verification gate — process design, not a single mechanical fix

short_title: Enumeration-completeness gate: emitted codes must have spec entry
alignment_rationale: advances rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — pilot-derived from akey (BC-2.1.008 v1.3/v1.5, akey#79/#80 help enum 6->14, 3 recurrences in one session); adds the code->spec enumeration-completeness direction complementing #440's spec->code check.
quick_win_disqualification: adding a new enumeration-completeness gate (extract emitted enum literals, subset-check vs the spec table) is new tooling, not a bounded mechanical fix

short_title: bc_h1_index_drift false positive: matches wrong BC-INDEX table
alignment_rationale: advances 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — pilot-derived bug (plugin rc.22 greenfield, concrete BC-2.1.001 repro); the matcher grabs the first BC-id occurrence (a satisfaction-table cell reading CAP-001) instead of the §2 title column, so a real H1<->index drift detector false-fires every edit and trains agents to ignore it. Structural, not project-specific.

short_title: count_propagation_drift false positive on historical counts
alignment_rationale: advances 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' — pilot-derived (rc.22; v1.0 '36 BCs' + STATE.md '38 BCs' historical vs current 41 repro); the scanner fails to distinguish current-count sites from immutable changelog/phase-history, causing permanent alert fatigue and a perverse incentive to rewrite the audit trail.

short_title: Variants-gallery review loop for aesthetic surfaces
alignment_rationale: neutral — surfaces a real gap (aesthetic ACs are under-determined by text specs, observed in a real Godot pilot run where a fully-green sprite still drew aesthetic-refinement directives), but proposes substantial new machinery (a variants-round primitive + gallery + fold-back loop) for a new-ish domain with no cited commit/file/hash; non_goals warn against 'scope expansion into new domains without surfaced architecture decisions'. Grounded enough not to drift, unproven enough not to advance.
quick_win_disqualification: a new review-loop feature spanning implementer, gallery rendering, feedback capture and attestation — unbounded machinery, not a mechanical fix

short_title: Unbounded in-head design work kills agents; need design skeletons
alignment_rationale: advances 'pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory' — transcript forensics on real agent deaths (two 32000-output-token deaths mid-design, a 23-min inference stall) plus a countermeasure that worked (orchestrator-supplied design skeleton); hardens dispatch against a panic-class failure. Zero work lost (worktree at RED commit), so recoverable.
quick_win_disqualification: fix is dispatch-template + task-decomposition policy changes (design skeletons, edit-run-iterate mandate, per-assertion grep) — process design, not mechanical

short_title: Mid-flight scope-relay race: agents finalize against stale scope
alignment_rationale: advances (pilot-derived, hardens the dispatch/messaging contract) — 3 instances in one day with grep-verified zero hits for amendment terms and a grep-verify countermeasure that caught all before commit; an agent-side inbox-drain-before-finalize contract removes the scope-relay race drift surface.
quick_win_disqualification: requires inter-agent contract, dispatch-template and completion-report protocol changes — multi-component, not mechanical

short_title: max-file-lines lint vs one-test-file-per-BC needs sharding rule
alignment_rationale: advances 'removes a drift surface' — pilot-derived collision (21 tests/~1490 lines against a 1500 lint limit, adjudicated as a version-suffixed shard precedent); codifying the sharding convention prevents ad-hoc per-project resolutions that CI traceability checks keyed on file naming would misfire on.
quick_win_disqualification: requires a governance convention decision (shard-by-version vs exempt test files from the limit) that sets precedent — judgment, not a mechanical fix

short_title: STATE.md validator invariants undocumented; rediscovered per burst
alignment_rationale: advances 'removes a drift surface / improves traceability' — pilot-derived (two bursts, 92 tool calls/~34 min in the reject-fix-retry loop, agent's own words); a validator contract discoverable only through serialized rejection messages is a hidden spec with Goodhart content-mangling risk. Documenting/pre-flighting the invariants closes it.
quick_win_disqualification: cheapest fix (hand-written reference doc) is drift-prone and paper-fix-flavored per non_goals; the robust fix (CI-generate from validator sources or a --check-all preflight) is non-trivial

short_title: Normative-AC symbols/call-forms never verified against code
alignment_rationale: advances 'pilot-derived engine process-gap hardening gates' — phantom FrameTypePEConnect (0 grep hits) and a compile-illegal Assemble signature survived 25+/26+ fresh-context passes because the symbol-resolution bar's perimeter was comments/anchors only; extends it to normative-AC surfaces with call-form validation (story changelogs v1.24/v1.25). Same-lever cluster with 563/564/574.
quick_win_disqualification: proposes an authoring bar + an adversary bar + a deferred-symbol triple-coverage discipline — process design, not a single mechanical fix

short_title: Placement-note API-derivation blocks reconstructed from memory
alignment_rationale: advances (pilot-derived, hardens architect authoring) — one placement note's 'Derivation from the outerassembler API' block carried a signature that never existed in the cited file, seeding three downstream defects (F-P1-001/F-P27-001/F-P28-001) across 28 passes; a full backtick-symbol sweep at authoring time prevents at a single point (note v1.5/v1.6). Same-lever cluster with 563/564/573.
quick_win_disqualification: fix is an architect-dispatch verification mandate + a full-note symbol-sweep shipping gate + an adversary early-pass bar — process design, not mechanical

short_title: Spec'd transition semantics had zero interleaving test coverage
alignment_rationale: advances 'closes a real defect class with a load-bearing test' — a real decrement/check race (commit 6b6f0cf) emitting duplicate EC-004 for one >=1->0 transition survived 28 passes because all three EC-004 tests were structurally single-actor; adds a concurrent-interleaving test rubric + adversary transition-ownership bar with RED-rate/mutation-pin discipline (RED caught 40-50% of 180 unfixed cycles).
quick_win_disqualification: the code fix already landed; the open work is a test-writer rubric + an adversary standing bar + RED-rate discipline — process design, not mechanical

short_title: adversary CLEAN verdict can contradict non-empty findings list
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / improves convergence soundness): adversary declared CLEAN while carrying 1 LOW finding, which would advance the convergence counter with an unresolved finding — the manifest's green-check-masking-a-finding integrity case (ratchet/convergence gate disagreeing with reality). Pilot-derived (jira-cli ADF cycle, engine rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true — silent convergence-counter corruption; never a quick win

short_title: meta-lens findings lack a convergence rule; inflate STRICT windows
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: improves convergence soundness / removes a drift surface): 2-3 NITPICK meta-observations per pass in late F2 (passes 16-19 of 19) are non-resetting but tax triage and contributed to a 44-pass F3 run. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: requires defining meta-finding classification + per-pass cap semantics — judgment, not mechanical

short_title: F2 convergence criterion not selected at F1 gate
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens an existing gate): F2 ran 11 rounds then an ad-hoc mid-cycle STRICT upgrade cost ~2-3 passes plus an unplanned pause; three cycles independently hit a 19-pass ceiling, making criterion selection the highest-leverage F2 cost control. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: requires defining STANDARD/STRICT escalation-trigger + pass-count semantics — judgment, not mechanical

short_title: no stale-finding rule; recurrence resets clean streak
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: improves convergence soundness): passes 13-19 reset the clean streak on previously-resolved LOW/NITPICK findings though the core contract was stable since ~pass 12 — the count-propagation recurrence class that inflates STRICT windows. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: requires 'substantively identical' finding-matching + escalation semantics — judgment, not mechanical

short_title: story template lacks mandatory CHANGELOG delivery task
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: closes a real defect class): story PR shipped with no CHANGELOG entry, caught only at F5 pass 3, forcing a docs fix-PR and a convergence reset; at least the 2nd occurrence. Low-leverage template fix but on-mission. Pilot-derived (rc.22).

short_title: F1 impact-boundary not retro-annotated when F2 supersedes scope
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: removes a drift surface): an F1 impact-boundary item ruled out-of-scope was later ruled in-scope by the F2 delta, but F1 was never annotated — future readers get stale scope guidance into F3. Pilot-derived (rc.22).

short_title: F1 perimeter scan omits index/count/traceability surfaces
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / removes a drift surface): a single BC addition produced repeated MED/LOW count-propagation findings across F2 fix rounds because the F1 perimeter scan omitted BC-INDEX and canonical-count surfaces. Pilot-derived (rc.22).

short_title: add per-cycle cost ledger (.factory/cost-summary.md) for reviews
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: improves traceability; the neutral cost-arc line resolves toward advances by surfacing a real gap): the first downstream session review found .factory/cost-summary.md never created and had to skip cost analysis, with only a rough ~1.2M-token F7 estimate available. Plain-file ledger, complements OTEL. Pilot-derived (rc.22).

short_title: learning loop non-functional; session-review never runs
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: self-referential pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own convergence — on-mission): 400+ sidecar-learning entries accumulated over two months with no session-review ever synthesized and no .factory/session-reviews/ dir — the continuous-improvement loop is structurally broken. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: multi-part process wiring (standing trigger + seeding + 72h auto-defer + resume-surfacing) — not bounded/mechanical

short_title: visual ACs must bind connectivity, not pixel-adjacency
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: closes a real defect class): a single-pixel adjacency bridge satisfied an attached AC while the human verdict read 'detached from the body' — local-window assertions systematically under-constrain gestalt properties and admit degenerate geometries. Pilot-derived pixel-art run.
quick_win_disqualification: core fix requires re-authoring visual ACs as connectivity/component tests — design work, not a mechanical guidance edit

short_title: agent operator docs cite fabricated tool surfaces; no gate
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: closes a real defect class with a load-bearing gate): 3 fabricated tool surfaces in one story, incl. a non-existent `gpg.ssh.signingKey` that git silently ignored, falling back to a software key and signing with zero YubiKey touch (verify-commit: no principal matched), caught only live in a scarce hardware-tap window; post-convergence docs get no adversarial coverage. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: requires building a docs-surface-validation gate + post-convergence review policy; high-caution (silent mis-routing)

short_title: story-authored grep gates false-fail and can't discriminate
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: removes a drift surface / closes a real defect class): 4 defective story grep gates in one cycle (3 false-FAIL from window-spillover/self-match/over-broad-alternation, 1 non-discriminating hollow-check per the #285/#177 class) plus a false 'CI gated: Yes' claim contradicted by the actual ci.yml. Pilot-derived (rc.22).
quick_win_disqualification: multi-part authoring-rule + behavioral-test-authority policy change — requires judgment, not mechanical

short_title: factory-side PR strands shared .factory worktree on chore branch
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: closes a real defect class): verbatim reflog shows the pr-manager left the shared .factory worktree on a chore branch post-merge with local factory-artifacts stale behind origin; the next agent (state-manager) began writing there with no git signal, caught only by an accidental orchestrator disk-audit — the manifest's produced-but-not-committed loss on spec_process/learning tiers, sibling of #523 silent factory-history loss. Pilot-derived (switchboard-blue, 2026-07-08).
quick_win_disqualification: high-caution worktree/branch-state fix with silent-data-loss blast radius; not bounded/mechanical

short_title: frozen factory artifacts lack machine-readable write protection
alignment_rationale: advances/'improves traceability or convergence soundness' + self-referential inversion (engine process-gap on-mission): frozen sprint-state.yaml took 27 misdirected appends (v1.71-v1.97) and forked version sequences with both files claiming v1.97, detected only accidentally during an unrelated verify — hardens .factory write discipline.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true (forked source-of-truth version sequence); fix is multi-part (frozen marker + full-path dispatch + monotonicity check)

short_title: integration ACs ship without end-to-end injection-topology trace
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate' + self-referential engine process-gap: two consecutive spec passes (F-SP1-001, F-SP2-001) found discharge-unreachable binding anchors that the 55-symbol #573 sweep passed cleanly — adds the topology-tracing sufficiency layer to spec authoring, caught pre-code with zero churn vs the sibling PE-CONNECTOR impl-time cost.
quick_win_disqualification: requires new story-authoring bar + adversary standing axis (judgment-heavy process change), not bounded/mechanical

short_title: implementer declares green on cargo test, not full CI gate set
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate' + self-referential engine process-gap: implementer declared Red->Green after cargo test while akey STORY-022 shipped CI-red on 6 clippy + fmt (commits ee62356/ea8dd0b/adc2782), voiding a clean streak. CI itself signals red (so integrity=false); completion criteria must cover every hard gate the repo defines.

short_title: async adversary verdicts dropped or stale-bound to superseded HEAD
alignment_rationale: advances/'improves ... convergence soundness': akey STORY-022 re-convergence had one adversary pass die on an API error (dropped verdict) and two arrive stale-bound to a pre-fix HEAD; with no verdict-HEAD binding a stale CLEAN can silently advance the clean-streak (ratchet-PASS-against-superseded-code, the #313 family). Synchronous capture + HEAD-stamp harden the gate.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true (stale/dropped verdict silently corrupts the convergence clean-streak accounting)

short_title: add instruction-sweep + RED-replay to standard convergence lenses
alignment_rationale: advances/'improves ... convergence soundness' (neutral rubric: a study surfacing a real drift surface tilts to advances): an 8-pass field cycle showed lens-rotation out-performing repeat-lens (findings 10->2->0->1->2->0->0->0, severity decaying); instruction-sweep (P4) and RED-replay (P8) caught defects nothing else did — cheap, generic catalog additions.

short_title: collision-guard exclusions orphan sweep obligations silently
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface': a correct collision-guard exclusion left live version pins un-swept; the narrowed-out obligation was never re-queued and stale pins reached CI (caught by the citation-staleness lint backstop, so not silent -> integrity=false). Requiring a queued deferred-sweep at exclusion time removes the drift surface.

short_title: remediation amendments cite nonexistent mechanisms / adjacent traps
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate' + self-referential engine process-gap: consecutive spec passes found a v1.4 rule creating a wrong-direction trap at the ReadOuterFrame site (F-SP5-001) and a v1.5 rule citing a maintainConn reconnect that never reads conn (F-SP6-001) — each amendment seeded the next pass's defect. Amendment-time mechanism verification collapses the descent.
quick_win_disqualification: requires new architect amendment-time mechanism-verification + adjacent-site audit bar (judgment-heavy), not bounded/mechanical

short_title: interface-surface amendments never enumerate implementors
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate' + self-referential engine process-gap: adding SetFrameCallback to the Handle interface would compile-break a test fake the same story declared 'existing, unmodified' (F-SP6-002); the type-system blast radius sits outside #573 symbol-fidelity and #590 topology tracing. Implementor enumeration prevents an internally-contradictory delivery contract.
quick_win_disqualification: requires new architect interface-implementor enumeration bar + FCL invariant (process change), not a bounded mechanical fix

short_title: guard implementer against vendored/wrong-layer test workarounds
alignment_rationale: advances/'closes a real defect class' + guards a stated non_goal (paper-fixes/wrong-layer workarounds): two field recurrences of an implementer editing a vendored test-framework file / shader post-processing setting to make a product test pass, reversed only in review. A prompt-level layer constraint blocks it at authoring time.

short_title: require snapshot-restore for tests mutating global engine singletons
alignment_rationale: advances/'closes a real defect class with a load-bearing test': a manager mutating the engine's global input-mapping singleton caused order-dependent cross-suite failures (Mandel, run-order-sensitive); a per-test snapshot-restore guard generalizes to any process-global engine state. Caught pre-merge, tests-only.

short_title: agent-authored lint gates ignore args + under-scan: vacuous green
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface': a changelog-ordering lint silently discarded file args, skipped the stories dir, and skipped v-prefixed rows, reporting '0 violations - PASSED' while descending inversions accumulated with zero CI signal — the vacuous-green family (#331) where a green check masks reality. Gate-the-gate self-test hardens it.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true (vacuous gate certifies PASS against unscanned files; a green check masks violations)

short_title: spec index sweep lands partial; report asserts full sweep done
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface': a 4-index sweep left frontmatter version: unbumped while the changelog row claimed the bump (frontmatter fiction, the #314 family) and inserted rows in wrong order (one masked by a CI parser gap); the completion report asserted the sweep from intent, not disk. Atomic-bump + report-from-disk close the silent divergence.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true (spec index frontmatter-version fiction; one inversion silent to CI via parser gap)

short_title: Phase-4 holdout budgets frozen without target-build capability canary
alignment_rationale: advances/'tightens an existing gate' + self-referential holdout process-gap: akey Phase-4 pre-registration froze ~144-146 YubiKey touches prescribing 'Approve in TUI' for HS-001/003/007, but the daemon runs headless (TUI unwired, akey#88) so RequireHumanReview hangs indefinitely; a must-pass scenario became BLOCKED-BY-DEFECT mid-run. A sighted-setup capability canary preserves budget/scoring integrity without breaking info asymmetry.
quick_win_disqualification: requires designing a new mandatory capability-canary setup step + attestation matrix (process/role change with judgment)

short_title: Test-input recipes ship physically unrealizable, survive 6 passes
alignment_rationale: advances (self-ref rubric: pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates/convergence). Evidence: F-SP11-001 in convergence-trajectory.md Pass-11 + placement-note changelog v1.8/v1.9 — a normative recipe unexecutable against the real read/parse path survived 6 adversarial passes; case 2 would ship a false-green test. Adds a physical-realizability discharge lens.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a new adversarial physical-realizability lens + discharge-trace obligation + companion-pin discipline — unbounded methodology change, not mechanical

short_title: Stories cite phantom artifacts; no cited-artifact preflight
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: closes a real defect class / removes a drift surface). Evidence: 3 phantom-artifact anchors in one Wave-10 batch on rc.22 (akey::daemon and akey::config actually in pipeline.rs; TUILayer::reject() has zero grep hits) — implementers would build against imagined code and grep gates pass vacuously. Adds a cited-artifact resolution preflight. self_referential keeps it on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a registration-gating preflight with a new-artifact escape-hatch — gate-caution + workflow integration, not low-caution mechanical

short_title: No model fallback when review diversity endpoint degrades (5 timeouts)
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / removes a drift surface — resilience). Evidence: 5 timeout deaths across 2 adversary instances on one gate, resume futile, reroute to a different reviewer family recovered with 8 clean passes. Operational stall with no fallback. Pilot-derived, on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: requires fallback-chain design, orchestrator routing rule, and diversity accounting — architectural, not mechanical

short_title: Binding adjudications ship compile-broken mechanics; no verification
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / improves convergence soundness). Evidence: 4 binding adjudications (E-2/E-7/E-12/E-14) proven compile-broken across a 12-pass arc on rc.22, consuming 4/12 passes as errata-correcting-errata. Extends the #603 preflight to the adjudication layer (binding ground truth).
quick_win_disqualification: adds a ruling-verification obligation (grep/compile-check per prescribed symbol/gate) to the adjudication flow — process design, not mechanical

short_title: Trait/type-surface changes lack a multi-axis migration checklist
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: removes a drift surface / convergence soundness). Evidence: one story needed 4 migration enumerations found one-per-pass (37 impl, 16 caller, 15 construction, 9 config; one axis inverted an AC via deny_unknown_fields). Adds a standard type-surface migration checklist. Corpus note: another rubric-lens addition (convert_finding_to_guard fingerprint).
quick_win_disqualification: introduces a standard multi-axis migration checklist into story-writer/architect guidance — methodology addition, not a bounded mechanical fix

short_title: RED gate doesn't confirm harness can observe test success
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: improves convergence soundness). Evidence: a fixture early-return capped an event counter at 1, so a correct N>1 implementation could not green; had the threshold been 1 the test would be a permanent false-green. RED gate proves fail-on-stubs but not observe-success. Pilot-derived one-story GREEN phase.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a RED-gate positive-control / observability obligation — test-harness methodology change requiring judgment, not mechanical

short_title: Spec convergence hardens contract without predecessor-suite step
alignment_rationale: advances but minutiae (rubric: convergence soundness; self-rated MED, caught and remediated correctly). Evidence: a correct-in-isolation resource-close contract broke a predecessor timing test 3/3 at GREEN across a ~24-pass arc. Ask is earlier detection via a static predecessor-suite impact step — a marginal earlier-detection guard (corpus minutiae / convert_finding_to_guard).
quick_win_disqualification: adds a predecessor-suite behavioral-blast-radius step to spec convergence — methodology change, not mechanical

short_title: Symmetric contracts pin inbound but ship outbound unpinned/revertible
alignment_rationale: advances but minutiae (rubric: removes a mutation-revertible drift surface). Evidence: inbound direction pinned, symmetric outbound value shipped unpinned; a one-line revert to a sibling value left the whole GREEN suite passing, caught 4 passes post-GREEN. Behaviorally inert single instance — a narrow symmetric-coverage guard (corpus minutiae).
quick_win_disqualification: adds a symmetry-coverage prompt + mutation-revert to test-writer/adversary contracts — methodology change, not mechanical

short_title: Grep gates in GNU BRE are false-GREEN on BSD/macOS inverse detectors
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / removes a drift surface) AND source-of-truth integrity. Evidence: 10 GNU-BRE-alternation gates on a macOS host, 3 confirmed vacuous — including a story's highest-recurrence inverse regression detector that could never fire. A regression detector structurally incapable of firing certifies PASS with no signal (spec_process anchor: the convergence/gate definition). Pilot-derived rc.22.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true — never quick-win-eligible (the syntax conversion is mechanical but the false-green integrity flag disqualifies)

short_title: Erratum sweeps scope to edit-set not review perimeter; residue reopens
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: removes a drift surface). Evidence: 3 under-scoped sweeps in a 38-pass arc on rc.22 each scoped to the edit-set/literal-string instead of the review perimeter/semantic vocabulary, accounting for 3/12 corrective errata (instance 3 left a false-green gate from #614). Adds a mandatory SWEEP DECLARATION block.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a mandatory SWEEP DECLARATION block with range/vocabulary/disposition obligations — methodology change, not mechanical

short_title: PostToolUse validators eval whole-file; 'block' doesn't block write
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: tightens a gate / removes a drift surface — validator harness). Evidence: PostToolUse validators flag pre-existing whole-file conditions (100% false-positive across 4 bursts) and block_intent fires while every write still lands, training indifference that 'will eventually swallow a real block.' Pilot-derived one session, on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: requires validator delta-scoping + honest block semantics + a corpus migration path — harness redesign, not mechanical

short_title: Template matching is filename-based, no scope awareness or override
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: removes a harness drift surface). Evidence: filename-only template matching hard-blocked a legitimate per-story convergence-report.md against the Phase-7 whole-pipeline scorecard (project was in Phase 3); the workaround permanently sacrificed the natural filename. Adds frontmatter/path/override matching. Pilot-derived, on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: changes template-matching strategy (frontmatter/path/override) across the compliance harness — design change with regression caution, not mechanical

short_title: Convergence declared CLEAN while branch CI was red (alarm fatigue)
alignment_rationale: advances (rubric: improves convergence soundness). Evidence: a per-story cycle declared 3/3 CLEAN across 12 passes while branch CI was red throughout — a pre-existing stale-pin red plus 10 real lint violations introduced by fix-commits, none caught because nobody ran gh run list. Adds CI-green-at-frozen-tuple; field evidence for #336. Pilot-derived, on-mission.
quick_win_disqualification: adds a CI-green-at-frozen-tuple convergence-protocol rule + re-lint-after-fix-commit discipline — protocol change, not mechanical

short_title: No instruction-sequencing protocol for async delegation
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric '(self-referential) a pilot-derived engine process-gap that hardens the factory's own gates' and 'tightens a drift surface': two real same-session orchestration incidents (four mutually-reverting edits from crossed reversals; a dual-channel task-desc-vs-message contradiction that made the assignee create a reserved issue) expose a missing supersession/single-source-of-truth-across-channels protocol. Generic to any mailbox-style multi-agent dispatch; self_referential flag makes it on-mission, not self-reference.
quick_win_disqualification: requires designing a sequence-marker/supersession protocol and cross-channel single-source-of-truth rule — design work, not a bounded mechanical edit

short_title: Design premise never traced against baseline before convergence
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'improves convergence soundness' and the self-referential inversion for pilot-derived engine process-gaps: twelve consecutive spec-adversarial passes (last three CLEAN, diverse traversals) converged on a guarantee whose 'sole trigger' premise was false — the signal's source object was a child of a caller-supplied parent, so parent cancellation closed it ~100us early. Only first empirical contact falsified it. A mandatory premise-audit lens (walk to the baseline construction site) closes a real convergence blind spot orthogonal to symbol/topology/predecessor-suite checks.
quick_win_disqualification: requires designing and integrating a new adversarial premise-audit lens into convergence — methodology work

short_title: Concurrency fix's join/lifetime obligations not audited same pass
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' and the self-referential pilot-derived-engine-gap clause: across one story's four remediation cycles, a fix that scoped a wait to a fresh snapshot introduced new helper goroutines without enumerating their join sites; the NEXT pass found the missing join, and a THIRD showed its defer-order dependency was load-bearing. A concurrency-fix self-audit obligation collapses the two-pass discovery into one. No defect shipped (all caught pre-merge); value is process hardening.
quick_win_disqualification: requires adding a self-audit obligation (join-site + ordering + pairwise-interaction enumeration) to the remediation contract — methodology work

short_title: Spec line-number citations lack a stated coordinate baseline
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'improves traceability' but low-leverage: a real delta-verification pass found a ground-truth line-number citation silently resolving to unrelated code after the landed tree grew earlier lines, because no baseline ref was stated. Mechanical grep-resolves-to-SOME-line masks the drift. A citation-convention statement in spec templates is a cheap, one-line traceability fix — individually sound but a minutiae-class engine-hygiene item (feeds the corpus-level low-leverage-ratio signal).

short_title: compute-input-hash --update silent no-op when field absent
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'closes a real defect class' and 'integrity gates functional': a shipped plugin binary that pipeline agents trust as ground truth for drift tracking reports success while writing nothing when the input-hash field is absent (find-and-replace, never find-or-create). The false success masks an unmaintained drift-tracking substrate — sibling to the manifest's named integrity example #314 in the same binary, and the exact vacuous-verification chain #599 warns about. Corrupted record is the regenerable input-hash field (recompute once fixed), but the silent false-success is source-of-truth corruption a green check must never mask.
quick_win_disqualification: integrity=true (silent source-of-truth corruption forbids quick-win by rule)

short_title: Concurrent hardening lanes share one checkout; mutation leaked
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'tightens an existing gate / removes a drift surface' (self-referential pilot-derived engine gap): in a real switchboard-blue Phase-6 run the secscan lane's deliberate mutations (inverted HMAC verify, gutted E-ADM-017 re-arm) leaked into the concurrently-dispatched fuzz lane's shared checkout; 'containment was luck, not structure' — a less-attentive lane could have reported clean against inverted HMAC (silent security false-green). An isolated-worktree dispatch contract for mutating lanes removes that structural surface. Cited reports (secscan-lane-report.md Incident, lessons.md #2).
quick_win_disqualification: requires a Phase-6 dispatch-contract change (isolated worktrees for concurrent mutating lanes + checkout-overlap cross-check) — infra/process work with concurrency caution

short_title: validate-policies-schema enforces fixture-derived wrong schema
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'closes a real defect class' and 'removes a drift surface': the plugin hook enforces a fixture-derived policies.yaml schema that is the exact reverse of the downstream project's internally-documented canonical convention (its v1.2 changelog aligned entries the hook demands un-aligning), fires latently on pre-existing POL-001/002/004, and cites D-472/F-PASS14-004/BC-5.39.008 which are grep-verified absent downstream (they live only in plugin test fixtures). schema_version-on-declarative-contracts is a principle this ecosystem already ratified. Report-only now, but trains operators to ignore a governance validator.
quick_win_disqualification: the schema-collision half needs a schema_version + project-declared-version validation and a migration path (design); only the fixture-citation strip is bounded/mechanical

short_title: Review playbooks use self-approve GitHub forbids; reviewDecision empty
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'tightens a gate' and unblocks convergence (self-referential pilot-derived gap): on real PR #121, GitHub rejected self-approve/request-changes so both passes fell back to --comment, leaving reviewDecision permanently empty for every PR the single-identity factory produces; the pr-manager stalled at the merge gate and went idle, requiring an orchestrator audit + manual resume. Detecting self-review up front and keying merge gates on the documented comment-fallback removes a structural convergence deadlock for the common single-operator setup.
quick_win_disqualification: requires playbook self-review detection plus re-keying the fix-pr-delivery merge gate off reviewDecision — design work touching merge gating (high caution)

short_title: Read-only adversary emits false BLOCKER on unrunnable gates
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'improves convergence soundness': a read-only adversary (no Bash) returned NOT CLEAN with a [BLOCKER] asserting cargo clippy would fail; the orchestrator ran the exact CI command (exit 0, zero let_underscore_must_use hits) and refuted it — the real kernel was a MINOR #[allow] consistency gap, not a CI blocker. The agent's own 'rests on static evidence' disclaimer did not cap severity. Capping execution-predicated findings below BLOCKER (they are inherently static-inference) plus a codified orchestrator run-the-gate obligation prevents false-BLOCKER masking of real findings.
quick_win_disqualification: requires an adversary severity-model change plus an orchestrator routing obligation and prompt guidance — methodology/design work

short_title: session-learning fires on Stop, inflates 'Session ended' markers
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'removes a drift surface' but low-leverage: session-learning is registered on event=Stop (assistant-turn end) yet writes 'Session ended' markers, so 168 markers accrued in ~26h across a handful of sessions (bursts 5-10s apart prove turn-stops), inflating the #584 learning-loop metric ~1 order of magnitude and misleading any future marker-count trigger. The plugin's own hooks.json already wires SessionEnd with once:true. Bounded config fix (move registration / dedupe / rename); substantive learning content is intact so this is observability noise, not learning-tier corruption — a minutiae-class hygiene item.

short_title: verify-sha-currency regex rejects 7-char SHAs; false NOT_FOUND
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'closes a real defect class' but low-leverage/diagnostic: verify-sha-currency.sh's 8-char-minimum regex reports 'STATE.md develop cited: NOT_FOUND' every run for develop_head:4c276d9 (git's 7-char short SHA), silently skipping the currency comparison for the field it most needs to verify while the check still PASSes; state-manager agents have normalized the broken sub-check. A [0-9a-f]{7,40} regex plus WARN-on-unextractable restores it. One-line fix, LOW severity — minutiae-class engine hygiene.

short_title: code-delivery {story-id} free variable; divergent-cased dirs
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'tightens a gate / removes a drift surface' but low-leverage recurring-cost: {story-id} in artifact-path-registry.yaml is a free variable, so on PR #121 pr-manager wrote code-delivery/vp042-bench/ while reviewers wrote code-delivery/VP-042-testenv-bench/ — both satisfy the block-level pattern, fragmenting the convergence record across two dirs and defeating a mid-delivery consolidation (two manual commits). Pinning the canonical path in child dispatch prompts and/or validating {story-id} case-exact against STORY-INDEX closes it. Minutiae-class dispatch hygiene.

short_title: factory-cas-push.sh assumes repo-root cwd; fails from worktree
alignment_rationale: advances per rubric 'closes a real defect class' but low-leverage: bin/factory-cas-push.sh (from the #170 single-writer lock work) does a relative 'cd .factory' and fails with 'cannot change to .factory' when invoked from inside the .factory worktree — the natural cwd for a state-manager-role agent — aggravated by harness cwd resets. 2 failures in one session, 2/2 recovered first-try with a repo-root prefix, 0 lost work. Resolving the repo/worktree root internally plus an actionable error makes the load-bearing push tool cwd-independent. Bounded robustness fix, minutiae-class.
